description_long: This object is a firearm with a long, slender barrel and a compact frame, featuring a metallic body with a matte gray finish and a dark brown grip. The grip appears to be ergonomically shaped, likely made of wood or a synthetic material, and is attached to the lower rear of the frame. The barrel is straight and unadorned, with no visible ribbing or venting, and extends significantly forward from the main body. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with no visible pump or lever mechanism present. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external features aside from the grip and trigger assembly. The object is consistent with a semi-automatic pistol rather than a traditional shotgun, given its proportions and lack of a pump or break-action mechanism.
description: A metallic firearm with a long barrel, matte gray finish, and a dark brown ergonomic grip. The design is streamlined with a rounded trigger guard and no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the dark brown grip, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the firearm.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the grip and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel with the frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long and straight
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, fully enclosing the trigger with no finger grooves or reinforcement
